caption: A person is filming a sports card opening on a desk featuring a black mat with red accents and the "JASPYS" logo. In the early stages, hands are seen lifting a holographic basketball card from a "OBSIDIAN" branded box, which also features text reading "AUTOGRAPHED". A small inset window shows a man with short dark hair wearing a black shirt, sitting in a room with white walls and equipment in the background. As the sequence progresses, the person holds up a specific holographic card featuring a player in a light blue jersey. The card displays the text "H-TOWN" and the name "KEGYON MARTINEZ" at the bottom. The "JASPYS" logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" appear as on-screen overlays throughout the footage, while the hands carefully manipulate and showcase the reflective surface of the trading card.
